mailer.verifyAccount.subject: Verify your account
mailer.verifyAccount.template.body:
Welcome to Play4Cash [username]!

Your verification code

[code]

The verification code will be valid for [verificationExpireMins] minutes. Please do not share this code with anyone

This is an automated message. If you did not request this, please ignore it and do not reply.

Play4Cash Team
mailer.verifyWithdrawal.subject: Withdrawal Verification
mailer.verifyWithdrawal.template.body:
Withdrawal request at Play4Cash

Hello [username]

We received your request to make a withdrawal. To proceed, please use the following verification code:

[code]

The verification code will be valid for [verificationExpireMins] minutes. Please do not share this code with anyone

This is an automated message. If you did not request this, please ignore it and do not reply.

Play4Cash Team
